item.title: Conference Talks
item.description: Invited SIAM Conference on Analysis of PDE, December 2014: 10:00-10:25 On the Optimal Control of Free Boundary Problems for the Second Order Parabolic PDEs, joint work with Dr. Ugur Abdulla Contributed SIAM SEAS Conference, May 2014: On the Optimal Control of Free Boundary Problems for the Second Order Parabolic PDEs, joint work with Dr. Ugur Abdulla Posters SIAM Annual Meeting, Summer 2012: Analysis of Interfaces for Nonlinear Diffusion-Convection Equations, joint work with Dr.

item.title: MATLAB Short Course
item.description: MATLAB Seminar (originally delivered on 8/31/2013) Course Files: DigitsOfPi.m, a routine which calculates the digits of pi to within a given tolerance, and handles input errors. exponential.m, an implementation of the exponential function. funct.m, some exercises with functions in MATLAB matrices.m, the matrices we defined and experimented with work.m, our initial batch of work. Recommended Links: Course in which students create GUI applications in MATLAB Here. GUI programming is a bit obtuse in MATLAB compared to e.

item.title: MTH 2201/2202
item.description: MTH 2201/2202: Differential Equations with Linear Algebra Please see the Canvas course website for all relevant information. Dr. Bukshtynov is hosting files relevant to introductory numerical linear algebra and programming in MATLAB, Mathematica, and Julia. Please see that course site if you are interested, and feel free to ask any questions on the codes.

item.title: Schedule
item.description: Day M T W R F Seminar and Teaching 12-2: MTH 1001 2-4: Office Hours 12-2: MTH 1001 2-4: Office Hours 12-2: MTH 1001 2-4: Office Hours Please feel free to send an email (jgoldfar@my.fit.edu) to ask a question or arrange an appointment.
